---
title: "`r params$title`"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: pdflatex
params:
  title:        "Model report"
  model_name:   ""
  model_desc:   ""
  config_df:    NULL
  counts_df:    NULL
  comm_df:      NULL
  sup_df:       NULL
  dem_df:       NULL
  trd_df:       NULL
  cns_df:       NULL
  windows_plot: NULL
  techs:        NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(ggplot2)
kb <- function(df, ...) if (!is.null(df) && nrow(df) > 0) knitr::kable(df, row.names = FALSE, ...)
```

`r if (isTRUE(nzchar(params$model_desc))) params$model_desc`

## Configuration

```{r config}
kb(params$config_df)
```

## Contents

```{r counts}
kb(params$counts_df)
```

```{r windows, fig.width=8, fig.height=4.5, eval=!is.null(params$windows_plot)}
params$windows_plot
```

## Commodities

```{r comm}
kb(params$comm_df)
```

## Supply

```{r sup}
kb(params$sup_df)
```

## Demand

```{r dem}
kb(params$dem_df)
```

```{r trd-header, results='asis', eval=!is.null(params$trd_df)}
cat("## Trade\n")
```

```{r trd, eval=!is.null(params$trd_df)}
kb(params$trd_df)
```

```{r cns-header, results='asis', eval=!is.null(params$cns_df)}
cat("## User constraints\n")
```

```{r cns, eval=!is.null(params$cns_df)}
kb(params$cns_df)
```

## Processes

```{r techs, results='asis', fig.width=6, fig.height=4}
for (tt in params$techs) {
  cat("\n\n### ", tt$name,
      if (nzchar(tt$desc)) paste0(" --- ", tt$desc), "\n\n", sep = "")
  if (!is.null(tt$draw_file) && file.exists(tt$draw_file)) {
    cat("![](", gsub("\\\\", "/", tt$draw_file), "){width=70%}\n\n", sep = "")
  }
  if (!is.null(tt$info_df) && nrow(tt$info_df) > 0) {
    print(knitr::kable(tt$info_df, row.names = FALSE))
    cat("\n")
  }
}
```
